title: Ashen + Nature's Spirit
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen and Nature's Spirit
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) with [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)? Tired of certain blocks using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack above [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) in your load order.

This pack is designed and intended for use with Ashen 16x and Nature's Spirit.

Credits:

Aim_Boot - [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack

Team_Hibiscus - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) mod
